welcome.title: Welcome to OpenClaw Desktop Plus
welcome.subtitle: OpenClaw Desktop Plus packages AI assistant as a native Windows desktop app with integrated installation and setup. This wizard will guide you through initial configuration.

model.title: AI Model Integration
model.description: Support for Anthropic, OpenAI, Google and other major providers with one-click API key setup.

channel.title: Multi-Channel Support
channel.description: Built-in Feishu, Telegram and other channel adapters to connect your team communication tools.

gateway.title: Local Gateway
gateway.description: Gateway runs securely on your machine with no data leaving your computer.

ready.title: Ready to Use
ready.description: Guided setup wizard completes configuration in minutes without manual config editing.

model.title: Model Configuration
model.subtitle: Select AI model provider and configure API key to power OpenClaw conversations.
model.apiKeyStored: API Key is stored locally only and never uploaded.
model.oauthHint: Sign in with OAuth in the browser (bundled OpenClaw CLI). For OpenRouter you can also paste an API key instead.
model.noKeyHint: This provider uses local credentials or environment configuration. API Key is not required.
model.endpointUrlHint: Overrides the provider base URL (LiteLLM, self-hosted gateway, alternate OpenRouter, etc.). Leave empty to use the official endpoint.
model.connectionFailed: Connection failed. Please check API Key and model ID.
model.networkError: Unable to connect to test service. Please check network connection.
model.testHint: Click "Test Connection" to verify API Key and model configuration.
model.noTestHint: This provider does not support automated testing in the wizard. You can continue and validate later using the CLI.

channel.title: Channel Configuration
channel.subtitle: Configure message channels to connect Feishu, Telegram, WhatsApp or Discord.

feishu.title: Feishu Channel
feishu.description: Create an app on Feishu Open Platform and obtain the following parameters.
feishu.requiredMissing: App ID and App Secret are required when Feishu is selected.

telegram.title: Telegram Channel
telegram.description: Create a bot via @BotFather and paste the token below.
telegram.configMissing: Bot token from BotFather is required when Telegram is selected.

discord.title: Discord Channel
discord.description: Create an application in the Discord Developer Portal and copy the Bot Token.
discord.configMissing: Bot token from Discord Developer Portal is required when Discord is selected.

slack.title: Slack Channel
slack.description: Configure your Slack app. Socket mode uses Bot Token + App-Level Token; HTTP mode uses Bot Token + Signing Secret.
slack.configMissing: Bot token is required; Signing Secret is required for HTTP mode.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp (Baileys)
whatsapp.description: Enable WhatsApp and add one or more accounts. After setup, scan each QR code in Control UI (Channels → WhatsApp).
whatsapp.accountsHint: Each account gets its own Baileys session. Pair via QR in Control UI after Gateway starts.

channel.skipHint: You can add channel configuration later in settings.

gateway.title: Gateway Settings
gateway.subtitle: Configure network port, bind address and authentication for Gateway service.
gateway.portCheckFailed: Port check failed. Please try again.
gateway.loopbackDesc: Only allow localhost (127.0.0.1) to access Gateway. Most secure option.
gateway.lanDesc: Other devices on LAN can access. Use auth token to secure the API.
gateway.autoDesc: Gateway chooses bind address automatically. May expose to public network; ensure firewall is configured.
gateway.tokenHint: Used for Gateway API authentication. Recommend keeping the auto-generated value.

complete.title: Confirm Configuration
complete.subtitle: Review the configuration below and click "Confirm & Start" to complete setup.
complete.configureViaUI: Configure via Control UI after setup
complete.starting: Starting Gateway (may take 1–5 minutes). Please wait…
complete.startHint: Gateway startup may take 1–5 minutes. Do not close this window.
complete.errorConfig: Configuration write failed. Check disk space and permissions, then retry.
complete.errorAuth: Credentials write failed. Check disk permissions, then retry.
complete.errorGateway: Gateway failed to start. Check if port is in use or view logs.

models.title: Models
models.subtitle: Change the default provider and model without re-running the setup wizard.
models.controlUiHint: In chat you can also pick a model from the Control UI composer (OpenClaw 2026.7+). This panel updates agents.defaults and auth profiles used by the Gateway.
models.liveCatalogDesc: Models reported by the Gateway (models.list). Pick one to set agents.defaults.model.primary.
models.catalogEmpty: No models from Gateway yet — start the Gateway or configure a provider first.
models.catalogFailed: Could not load Gateway model catalog.
models.quickApplied: Default model updated. Gateway restart requested.

failover.title: Failover & key rotation
failover.desc: When a provider hits rate limits, OpenClaw rotates auth profiles first, then tries the model fallback chain (same idea as OpenRouter multi-key / fallback).
failover.fallbacksHint: One provider/model per line (e.g. openrouter/anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5). Used after auth-profile rotations are exhausted.
failover.rotationsHint: How many auth profiles to try on HTTP 429 before moving to the next fallback model (auth.cooldowns.rateLimitedProfileRotations).
failover.profilesEmpty: No extra API keys yet for the current provider. Add another key below to rotate on rate limits.
failover.addKeyHint: Creates an auth profile and appends it to auth.order so the gateway can rotate keys.
failover.savedRestarted: Failover settings saved. Gateway restart requested.

vision.title: Vision & PDF models
vision.desc: When the primary chat model cannot read images or PDFs, OpenClaw routes attachments through these models (agents.defaults.imageModel / pdfModel).
vision.imageModelHint: provider/model used for image attachments and the image tool. Leave empty to rely on the primary model or auto-detect. Existing fallbacks in config are preserved when you change only the primary.
vision.pdfModelPlaceholder: Same as image model if empty
vision.pdfModelHint: Used by the PDF tool. If empty, falls back to the image model, then the session model.
vision.savedRestarted: Vision settings saved. Gateway restart requested.

channels.title: Channels
channels.subtitle: Manage messaging channels. Multiple channels can be active at once; WhatsApp supports multiple accounts.
channels.whatsappDesc: Enable WhatsApp and add account ids for each phone/session. Pair with the QR below (or Control UI) after saving.
channels.waLinkStep1: Save WhatsApp settings if you changed them (Gateway may restart).
channels.waLinkStep2: Click Show QR below and wait for the image — keep this panel open.
channels.waLinkStep3: In WhatsApp on your phone: Linked Devices → Link a device → scan the QR.
channels.waQrHint: If Control UI Settings does not show the QR image, use this panel — it talks to the same Gateway login API. After Show QR, the shell auto-waits and refreshes the code when WhatsApp rotates it (~15–20s).
channels.noAccounts: No accounts yet — add at least one (e.g. default).
channels.savedRestartHint: Saved. Gateway restarting — use Show QR below to pair.
channels.telegramDesc: Bot token from @BotFather. Delivery and topics are managed in Control UI.
channels.discordDesc: Bot token from the Discord developer portal.
channels.slackStrippedDesc: Slack is stripped from this Windows bundle because Slack SDK deps are not shipped with the npm OpenClaw tarball. Use Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp, or Feishu here — or run upstream OpenClaw with Slack deps for Slack.
channels.feishuDesc: App credentials plus pairing/allowlist for Feishu DMs.

embed.attachTitle: Attach images or documents to the chat composer
embed.attachFailed: Could not attach files. Open Chat in Control UI and try again.
embed.openMcpTitle: Open MCP / Plugins in Control UI

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Gateway status, version info, and quick access to settings and logs
dashboard.errorHint: Gateway service exited unexpectedly. Check logs or retry.
dashboard.mainAria: Dashboard - Gateway status and quick actions
dashboard.newUpdateBody: Version Shell v{{version}} is ready to install.
dashboard.doctorDesc: Run OpenClaw doctor plus desktop bundle checks. Use Fix to apply known config migrations (doctor --fix).

settings.title: Settings
settings.closeToTrayDesc: Off by default — closing quits normally and the app stays on the taskbar while open. Turn on only to keep running in the tray after close.
settings.autoStartDesc: Launch OpenClaw when you sign in to Windows
settings.languageDesc: Choose the interface language for the app window and system tray.
settings.themeDesc: Choose the display theme for the app
settings.updateChannelDesc: Choose between stable releases or beta for early access
settings.feishuSectionDesc: Approve DM pairing and manage the local allowlist.
settings.generalSectionDesc: How the desktop window behaves, looks, and updates.
settings.modelSectionDesc: Choose provider, model ID, and credentials—aligned with the setup wizard and native OpenClaw settings; apply to the main default or an existing agent.
settings.modelNoConfig: No OpenClaw config yet. Complete the setup wizard first.
settings.modelNoAgents: No multi-agent entries in config; only the main default is available.
settings.modelApiKeyHint: Leave empty to keep the existing key; enter a value to rotate credentials.
settings.gatewaySectionDesc: Run a local bundled gateway, or attach to a remote OpenClaw gateway (VPS, Tailscale, or SSH tunnel). Mobile Connect needs LAN bind (or a reachable remote URL).
settings.gatewayBindHint: Mobile Connect QR needs LAN (or Auto). Loopback cannot be scanned from a phone.
settings.gatewayRemoteUrlHint: Example: ws://192.168.1.10:18789 on Wi‑Fi, ws://100.x.x.x:18789 on Tailscale, or ws://127.0.0.1:18789 after SSH -L.
settings.gatewayTransportHint: SSH: keep URL on loopback and open the tunnel yourself. Direct: point URL at the reachable host.
settings.gatewayRemoteApplied: Remote gateway attached. Control UI loads from the remote URL.
settings.gatewayLocalLanApplied: Local gateway restarted on LAN bind — Mobile Connect QR can advertise this PC.

feishu.title: Feishu Settings
feishu.subtitle: Approve new DM users without leaving the app or using the global CLI.
feishu.credentialsSectionDesc: App ID and App Secret from the Feishu Open Platform. Stored in openclaw.json under channels.feishu.
feishu.credentialsRequired: App ID and App Secret are both required.
feishu.credentialsRestartHint: Restart Gateway from the Dashboard if the bot does not pick up changes.
feishu.summaryEmpty: No pending rows in local credential files. If the bot already sent a pairing code, paste it below.
feishu.policyHint: Keep DM policy on pairing: users message the bot first, then approve here.
feishu.pendingDesc: Users appear after they DM the bot and receive a pairing code.
feishu.manualCodeTitle: Approve using the code from Feishu
feishu.manualCodeDesc: If the list is empty but you have a code from the bot, enter it here.
feishu.noPending: No pending requests. Ask the user to message the bot first.
feishu.approvedDesc: These users can DM the bot without a new pairing code.
feishu.allowlistNote: Stored in the local Feishu allowlist used by OpenClaw pairing.
feishu.loadFailed: Failed to load Feishu pairing state

llmApi.addCustomEndpointHint: Provider ID, base URL, and model ID are required. Writes models.providers and sets it as the default model.
llmApi.noProfiles: No profiles yet. Add one below.
llmApi.addProfileCustomHint: For a new OpenAI-compatible host, pick “Custom (OpenAI/Anthropic Compatible)” — base URL and model ID fields appear below.
llmApi.customProfileFieldsHint: Custom endpoint needs a provider id, base URL, and model id (written to models.providers).
llmApi.customProfileFieldsRequired: Provider ID, base URL, and model ID are required for a custom endpoint.
llmApi.rateLimit: Rate limit reached. Try again later.

skillsPanel.title: Skills & Extensions
skillsPanel.stripNotice: Desktop strips Slack and amazon-bedrock extensions from the bundled runtime (heavy/missing npm deps). They may still appear in catalogs but will not load here.
skillsPanel.clawhubDesc: Search and install skills from the public ClawHub registry into this machine’s OpenClaw state (local gateway).
skillsPanel.clawhubEmpty: No matching skills. Try another query.
skillsPanel.clawhubRemoteDesc: This Desktop shell is attached to a remote gateway. Install skills on the remote host via Control UI — local ClawHub install would not reach that gateway.
skillsPanel.controlUiShortcutsDesc: Open gateway pages (works for local and remote).
skillsPanel.installDesc: Pass a package name, path, or URL to `openclaw plugins install`.
skillsPanel.emptyHintNoneSkills: Skills will appear here once detected in the OpenClaw installation.
skillsPanel.emptyHintNoneExt: Extensions will appear here once detected in the OpenClaw installation.
skillsPanel.emptyHintFiltered: Try adjusting search or filter criteria.

updates.title: Updates & Maintenance
updates.checkHint: Check if a newer version of OpenClaw Desktop Plus is available on GitHub.
updates.upToDate: You are running the latest version ({{version}}).
updates.reinstallHint: Reinstalling the application should resolve missing files.
updates.healthCheckHint: Run a comprehensive health check including bundle integrity, configuration validity, and service readiness.
updates.reinstallDesc: If bundle integrity checks fail, download the latest installer from the GitHub releases page and reinstall. Your configuration and data will be preserved.
updates.resetConfigDesc: If configuration is corrupt, delete the configuration file and restart the app. The setup wizard will run again to create a fresh configuration.
updates.rollbackDesc: To rollback to a previous version, download an older installer from the GitHub releases page. Previous releases are always available for download.

flow.updateAvailableBody: A newer version is ready to install: Shell v{{version}}
flow.confirmGatewayStop: Gateway will temporarily stop. Confirm restart?
flow.rollbackHint: To rollback: download a previous installer from the releases page and reinstall. Your configuration will be preserved.

error.preloadBody: Preload script failed to load, internal communication is unavailable. Please try reinstalling or repackaging the app.
error.preloadHint: If debugging, check that `index.cjs` exists in `resources/app.asar(.unpacked)/out/preload/`.
